stem: Line m in the xy-plane has a slope of -1/4 and passes through the point (8, 7). Which equation defines line m?
rationale: Choice B is correct. A line with slope m passing through (x₁, y₁) can be written y = m(x - x₁) + y₁. Here y = (-1/4)(x - 8) + 7 = -x/4 + 2 + 7 = -x/4 + 9. Choices A and C use the point's coordinates as slope. Choice D ignores the contribution of x₁ to the y-intercept.
